title: Perfectly Yeasty Russian Cheese Dumplings
description: A festive Russian dish featuring sweet chilli sauce and a delicious cheese pull, these dumplings are perfect for a special occasion. They are made with a yeasty dough and filled with a blend of cheeses.
instructions: Combine the flour and yeast in a large mixing bowl and stir to combine.
Gradually add the warm water to the bowl and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a large pot of salted water over high heat and bring to a boil.
Meanwhile, combine the ricotta cheese, feta cheese, sweet chilli sauce, eggs, salt, and black pepper in a bowl and mix well.
Once the dough has risen, punch it down and divide it into 8 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece of dough into a thin circle and place a tablespoon of the cheese mixture in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half moon shape and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Carefully add the dumplings to the boiling water and cook for 10 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and serve hot with additional sweet chilli sauce if desired.
